area: Product charter validator / ignored residue isolation
finding: `validate:cli` failed during ATM-GOV-0124 because `validate-product-charter` scanned `templates/skills/atm-memory-consolidate.skill.md`, an ignored/untracked residue excluded by `.git/info/exclude`, and treated its `tools_node/` text as a protected downstream-only term violation.
expectedBehavior: Product charter validation should check governed tracked files and intentional unignored new files, while ignored/untracked residue remains outside close gates unless explicitly claimed.
evidenceOrRepro: Repro: `npm run validate:cli` failed with `[product-charter:validate] templates/skills/atm-memory-consolidate.skill.md contains downstream-only term: tools_node/`; `git check-ignore -v` showed `.git/info/exclude:10:templates/`.
followUp: ATM-GOV-0124 updates `scripts/validate-product-charter.ts` to filter protected-scope enumeration through git tracked/ignore state before scanning banned terms.
